basic_details.job_title: Dr. N.C. Joshi Memorial Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Dr. N.C. Joshi Memorial Hospital Recruitment 2026: Dr. N.C. Joshi Memorial Hospital is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 7 Senior Resident posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: 05 Years Relaxation for SC/ST and 03 Years for OBC

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma or any other equivalent qualification in the concerned specialty recognized by National Medical Commission (Previously known as Medical Council of India)
qualification.details: MBBS with PG Degree/Diploma or any other equivalent qualification in the concerned specialty recognized by National Medical Commission.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Dr. N.C. Joshi Memorial Hospital Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Resident posts at Dr. N.C. Joshi Memorial Hospital is scheduled for 09 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for the Senior Resident post at Dr. N.C. Joshi Memorial Hospital. These vacancies are distributed across various specializations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is MBBS with a PG Degree/Diploma or any equivalent qualification in the concerned specialty recognized by the National Medical Commission.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Resident post is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST and OBC categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Senior Resident position is as per the pay matrix of level 11, ranging from Rs. 67700 to Rs. 208700 per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the Dr. N.C. Joshi Memorial Hospital located?
faq.answer: Dr. N.C. Joshi Memorial Hospital is located in New Delhi, with the pincode 110005.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an Interview and Document Verification. Candidates who perform well in the interview and have their documents verified will be considered for the post.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Dr. N.C. Joshi Memorial Hospital Recruitment 2026?
